indications.text:
Minastrin 24 Fe is indicated for use by females of reproductive age to prevent pregnancy [see
Clinical Studies (14)].
The efficacy of Minastrin 24 Fe in women with a body mass index (BMI) of more than 35
kg/m2 has not been evaluated.
